name: Combat Cubic Arena HTML5
description: Numerous peer-to-peer battle royale matches are available, and they can provide hours of entertainment for players. Players are drawn in by the games stunning graphics, powerful weapons, and intense in-game rivalry. Losing oneself in ones favourite online multiplayer game might turn the tide of war and replenish ones stocks. Clash of Dragons is an excellent example of this type of game since it provides a collaborative online experience in which players can form alliances to take on enemies.
instructions: wasd - walk mouse- aim look around shoot tab- menu space- jump
tags: Action, Android, Block, HTML, HTML5, Minecraft, Mobile, Pixel, Shooter, Shooting, survival, Unity3D, WebGL
